# CWE-279 — Incorrect Execution-Assigned Permissions (vulnerable) (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-279-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"net/http"
	"os"
	"strconv"
)

// Vulnerable: forces world-writable mode regardless of user preference.
func StoreArtifact(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	if r.Method != http.MethodPost {
		http.Error(w, "method not allowed", http.StatusMethodNotAllowed)
		return
	}
	modeStr := r.FormValue("mode")
	mode, _ := strconv.ParseUint(modeStr, 8, 32)
	name := r.FormValue("name")
	if name == "" {
		http.Error(w, "missing name", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	path := "/data/uploads/" + name
	_ = os.WriteFile(path, []byte(r.FormValue("body")), 0777)
	_ = mode
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusOK)
}
